detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 進修部學士班	113學年度第2學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 流行文化與社會 (Pop Culture and Society)	開課班級 : 進大學通識	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 侯建州	必選修 : 必修	 	 


1.教學目標
The notion of pop culture is not easily delineated. It is a multifaceted and intricate concept encompassing many phenomena, including fashion, chic, consumer culture, leisure culture, luxury culture, material culture, popular lifestyles, popular tastes, urban culture, subculture, mass culture, and mass culture. This expansive concept denotes culture disseminated across various levels, classes, and population strata in a specific region or globally, following a certain pace and cycle. This course aims to facilitate an exploration and understanding of the intricate relationship between modern popular culture and capitalism. Through this exploration, students will develop a post-critical reflective perspective while engaging with the subject matter dynamically and engagingly. 


2.教學綱要
This course's objective is to facilitate an exploration and comprehension of the intertwined dynamics between modern popular culture, capitalism, and globalization. It is designed to foster the development of a critical and reflective perspective while also ensuring an engaging and enjoyable learning experience.

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Attendance in class, participation in discussion: 60%　 　　　　　　 Midterm test (or report), final examination (or report): 40% 
Adherence to the established regulations by the instructor is mandatory, as is active engagement in class discussions. Students are expected to complete all assignments and reports to the best of their abilities. 
The instructor will make adjustments according to actual needs. It is imperative to attend classes regularly and that absences be formally approved in accordance with established policies.
